description: Product Description United Oddsocks - Box of 6 Socks for Men The Grump Heads Feeling grumpy? Let these quirky, colorful Oddsocks take a bite out of your tension! Gift favourite for him, whether it's for Birthday, Christmas, Secret Santa or Father's day, is sure to bring the smile to anyone's face ! Get these socks to the grumpy men in your life ! Sock Specs: United Oddsocks are SEDEX,INTERTEX and OEKO-Tex Certified ! These Grump Heads socks are not only stylish but provide comfort with soft and breathable cotton-rich material. They offer a convenient stretch for a comfy and secure fit. Each pair features a unique “Grump Heads” design, perfect for mixing and mismatching. Whether you’re having a grumpy day or just want to add some color to your outfit, these socks have got you covered. Socks that celebrate your individuality! Feeling grumpy? Let these quirky, colorful Oddsocks take a bite out of your tension! Perfect for the odd sock lover who never matches their pairs anyway! Perfect for those who believe that life is too short for boring socks! Sprinkle your outfit and ooze self expression! Perfect Gift : These socks make a great gift for anyone who enjoys fun and quirky socks! So, why settle for boring socks when you can have a box of fun? Slip into these Grump Heads and let your feet do the talking! Discover United Oddsocks Quirky Socks Range!
